nodes.context: Italian-American Mafia family based in New York, controlling organized crime in Springfield, Massachusetts.

nodes.original_text_name: Springfield faction of the Genovese crime family
nodes.context: A crew of the Genovese crime family operating in Springfield, Massachusetts, involved in racketeering, gambling, loansharking, and extortion.
Italian-American Mafia family based in New England, allied with the Genovese crime family.
Italian-American Mafia family based in New York, with members operating in Springfield.

edges.evidence_quote: The Springfield faction of the Genovese crime family is a group of Italian-American mobsters who control organized crime activities in the Springfield, Massachusetts area.
edges.context: The Springfield faction is a sub-unit of the Genovese crime family.
The Genovese crime family is allied with the Patriarca crime family.

edges.evidence_quote: In 2024, longtime West Springfield mobster Frank "Frankie Pugs" Pugliano helped the Genovese family end territory tension after Gambino mobster Carmine "Carm the Barber" Manzi, also based in Springfield, began expanding rackets into the Hartford area of Connecticut.
edges.context: The Genovese Springfield faction and Gambino family had territorial tension that was resolved.
